Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Daniel Feder, Esq. (415.391.9476; daniel@dfederlaw.com) for Plaintiff.
Shirley Jackson, Esq. (408.286.9800; sjackson@hopkinscarley.com) of Hopkins & Carley for Defendants.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS OKMK2, LLC, OMID KORDESTANI AND GISEL KORDESTANI'S Motion to Compel Plaintiff Rachel Rogers To (1) Comply With Her Statement Of Compliance In Response To Request For Prodution Of Documents Nos. 7, 18, And 22, And (2) Attend, Testify, And Produce Documents Requested In The Deposition Notice At Deposition And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Rachel Rogers And/Or Her Counsel The Law Offices Of Daniel Feder is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

FOR TENTATIVE RULING.

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Apr-21-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS OKMK2, LLC, OMID KORDESTANI, AND GISEL KORDESTANI'S MOTION TO TRANSFER.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendants OKMK2, LLC, Omid and Gisel Kordestani's motion to transfer venue to San Mateo County is denied. Likewise, defendants' request for attorneys' fees is also denied.

(See Word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.)

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
